codeReview.summary: Fail. The fix improves seam behavior, but it does not satisfy the feature contract or fully resolve the prior failure: crossflow tests were still failing, and one test seam path still no-ops when in-memory profiles are stale.

issues.description: `testTriggerSelectAndSwitch` still gates switch execution on an in-memory profile lookup (`if let profile = foundProfile`). In test contexts where `profiles` is stale/empty, this path no-ops and does not exercise `selectAndSwitch`, so UI-action-driven switch proof remains unreliable.

Prior blocking gaps from `integration-hardening-finalize-crossflow-rendered-ui-launch-trace-evidence` remain unaddressed by this fix commit because this file is unchanged in `27463c06...`; rendered-indicator and UI-action-proof obligations from the failed review are not resolved here.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `switcher-ui-worker` procedure compliance is overstated: handoff sets `followedProcedure=true` without manual UI checks or context-read evidence required by the skill file.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff `2026-04-10T14-44-44-032Z__integration-hardening-fix-ui-action-seam-sync-for-crossflow-tests__6e073f26-ef8c-4cf6-aaa3-d4e5cf6c9d65.json` shows `interactiveChecks: []` and only test commands; `.factory/skills/switcher-ui-worker/SKILL.md` requires manual UI sanity checks and context-read evidence when claiming `followedProcedure=true`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: SwiftUI debug seams used by crossflow tests are brittle when they depend on view-local `@State` collections (`profiles`) rather than store-backed identifiers; this recurring constraint is not captured in shared testing guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Fix commit `27463c06...` attempted seam stabilization but kept popover `testTriggerSelectAndSwitch` dependent on in-memory profile lookup. Handoff still reports 9 failing crossflow tests and attributes failures to reload/seam behavior.

summary: Reviewed mission artifacts, prior failed review, fix handoff/transcript skeleton, skill requirements, and both diffs (`01921b8cc62428f51cc6819bb7579d5db2ca4a90` and `27463c06c435ef9d4d66011da10814f1d406867f`). The fix is insufficient: it partially patches seam behavior but does not close the prior failure contract and still leaves unreliable UI-action seam behavior in popover test hooks.
